review: order ahead but still have to wait just as long for my food what is the point of ordering ahead if they wait till you get there to start cooking your food

every time I try to use the app it's nothing but a struggle. it sent my email a login request and I used it and then when I tried to order something it just loaded the bag for 10 minutes straight and nothing ever worked and then when I went to the till they said they couldn't do anything without the app working. no discounts, nothing
